notes: Solid snake implementation with smooth movement, proper collision detection, speed scaling, audio, and high score persistence; minor issue with eye positioning being hardcoded rather than direction-relative but overall well-executed.
Excellent implementation with a solid game loop and audio, though input buffering drops rapid keystrokes and snake eyes face the wrong way when moving left.

A solid and complete Snake clone with proper movement, growth, collision, pause/restart, and decent presentation, but it loses points for relying on ctx.roundRect compatibility and for minor control/UI polish gaps such as no preventDefault on arrow keys and a slightly misleading title-screen instruction set.
